content: Carriage Driver: Damn this fog’s thicker than a giant’s cum after a week-long rut. Can barely see the road, let alone any of them bandit sluts lurkin’ about. Lydia: Aye, and the rain’s makin’ my armor stick to my tits like a horny skeever’s tongue. Perfect ambush weather for those Imperial whores huntin’ my Thane. Carriage Driver: Heh, you housecarls got it rough. All that ass-kissin’ and sword-swingin’ just to keep some Dragonborn’s balls drained. Bet you’d gut me if I so much as looked at ‘im wrong. Lydia: Damn right I would. MJR’s cock is mine—well, mine and that pale-skinned vampire cunt Serana’s, though I’d rather shove my greatsword up her tight little arse than share. Carriage Driver: Sounds like you’re more obsessed with her than him. Maybe you just wanna ride blade instead? Lydia: Fuck you, old man. I’d sooner let a Falmer spit-roast me than touch that liberal bloodsucker. She’s probably off somewhere suckin’ Thalmor dick right now while I’m out here keepin’ Skyrim pure.

Katla: Ugh, this damn rain. Can't even see my own tits past the mist, and that's sayin' somethin'. That dumbass husband of mine better not be lazin' around inside again. Carriage Driver: Hah! Better than my last haul—got jumped by a pack of Rieklings near Dawnstar. Little fuckers didn’t just want my gold, either. Had to beat ‘em off with my cock still out. Katla: Shoulda let ‘em have their fun. Ain’t like you got much dignity left drivin’ that broke-down wagon all day. Bet them Rieklings woulda done a better job plowin’ than Snilling. Carriage Driver: Might’ve, but I ain’t lettin’ filthy blue savages mount me like some cheap whore in the Riften alleys. Seen enough o' that shit near Windhelm—bandits fuckin’ draugr right in the barrows. Disgusting. Katla: Disgusting? Pfft. Heard the Jarl’s daughter got dragged into one o’ them by a pack o’ necromancers last week. Came back walkin’ funny and grinnin’ like a fool. Least they paid her after. Carriage Driver: By Dibella’s tits, that’s the damn Tamriel we live in. Can’t let the cows out without some skeever-fucker tryin’ to rut ‘em. Gods, I miss the days when bandits just robbed ya instead of bendin’ ya over first. Katla: Ain’t that the truth. Gotta keep my boy Knud close, else some horny falmer’ll snatch him up. Little shit’s got his father’s brains—would probably thank ‘em before runnin’.

Katla: Ugh, speakin’ o’ Knud—better go check if that little bastard’s tramplin’ the crops again. Last time I caught him pretendin’ to plough the damn wheat like some drunk bandit. Carriage Driver: Hah! Kid’s got spirit. Might make a decent stablehand one day—if he don’t get fucked to death by a troll first. Katla: If he does, I’ll charge the beast for the privilege. Now piss off ‘fore I charge for standin’ in my rain. Carriage Driver: Fine, fine. I’ll go see if any drunk idiots need a ride to get robbed—or worse. Dibella’s mercy, this province’s gone to shit.
